data.label: The Scale Problem
data.description: Overcoming the biological limitations of human cosmic perception (Highway Moon Drive & Pale Blue Dot).

data.label: The Radio Bubble
data.description: Our 100 light-year sphere of leaked signals compared to the Pacific Ocean of the Milky Way.

data.label: Cosmic Distance Ladder
data.description: Overlapping calibration rungs reaching the deep cosmos: Parallax, Cepheids, Type Ia Supernovae, and Redshift.

data.label: Standard Candles
data.description: Henrietta Swan Leavitt's discovery linking pulsation rate to intrinsic luminosity in Cepheid variables.

data.label: The Particle Horizon
data.description: The absolute edge of the observable universe governed by the speed of light and the 13.8B year age of the cosmos.

data.label: Observable Universe
data.description: A 93-billion-light-year diameter sphere of 'ghost' images stretched by expanding space.

data.label: Cosmic Event Horizon
data.description: The 16-billion-light-year absolute boundary where expanding space exceeds the speed of light.

data.label: Reachable Bubble
data.description: The nested 32-billion-light-year diameter volume that humanity could theoretically visit or contact.

data.label: The Cosmic Web
data.description: Sponge-like network of dark matter filaments and vast empty voids (Laniakea, Local Void).

data.label: The Boötes Supervoid
data.description: A colossally empty bubble 330 million light-years wide, holding only ~60 galaxies instead of 2,000.

data.label: Curvature of Space
data.description: Planck Satellite CMB mapping confirming space is flat to within a margin of error, indicating an infinite universe.

data.label: The Closing Window
data.description: Our highly privileged epoch. Driven by dark energy, galaxies will eventually cross the horizon and disappear forever.

data.label: Milkomeda & Isolation
data.description: In trillions of years, the local group merges. Cosmic expansion leaves a pitch-black night sky.

data.label: Psalm 19 Reflection
data.description: C.S. Lewis's paradox of silent preaching: how the silent heavens reveal majesty, while moral law reveals personal character.
